title: chaetocarpus echinocarpus
intro: Chaetocarpus echinocarpus, also known as the spiny fruit tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Clusiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Chaetocarpus echinocarpus are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, treat various skin conditions, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be made from its leaves and fruits.
